violations.text: There was no evidence that employees are required to report to the person in charge information about their health (illnesses, symptoms) as they relate to diseases that are transmissible through food. Inspector provided RIDOH guidance. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/27/2025
The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. Inspector provided RIDOH guidance. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/27/2025
The hand washing sink in the kitchen was blocked by gloves, towels, and spray bottles. Items were removed during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/27/2025

Cooked and cooled chicken was observed held at 44 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC dsisposed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/27/2025
Containers of cooked beans were observed stored on the floor in the walk-in freezer. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 03/27/2025

The hood system in the kitchen area has an accumulation of grease residue and debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 04/10/2025
